eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Randall, TX; at 12:36 PM ON MAY 15, 2026 Effective until 01:36 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Please evacuate due to active wildfire. This order is effective until further notice. Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Check social media for updates. Stay informed via local news or official channels.
